content.text: Write a simple add function in src/calculator.ts using TDD.

payload.name: apply_patch
payload.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /workspaces/conduct/src/calculator.test.ts
+import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest'
+
+import { add } from './calculator.js'
+
+describe('calculator', () => {
+  it('adds two numbers', () => {
+    expect(add(2, 3)).toBe(5)
+  })
+})
*** End Patch

payload.output:
FAIL  src/calculator.test.ts > calculator > adds two numbers
AssertionError: expected undefined to be 5 // Object.is equality

- Expected: 5
+ Received: undefined

 at src/calculator.test.ts:6:25

Test Files  1 failed (1)
     Tests  1 failed (1)
